title: Coldplay Kisscam
description: The Coalplay Kisscam Mod features the kiss cam moment with the CEO and Head of Villager Resources from Grasstronomer.
body:
This mod recreates the infamous Coalplay kiss cam scandal in Minecraft. When two villagers begin to breed within 20 blocks of a jukebox that's playing music, a special event is triggered: a custom audio clip plays, a small explosion occurs, one of five exclusive custom items is dropped at random, and five minutes later, one of three unique, lore-based chat messages is broadcast to all players. The five items are not craftable and can only be obtained through the kiss cam event, Creative mode, or the /give command.

This mod is built for Minecraft 1.20.1 Java Edition using Forge.

Originally, the event required the custom disc Sky Full of Nether Stars to be playing. The latest version allows any music disc to trigger the event, though some discs may still cause issues.
